Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\ruuva\\workspace\\RDM-7_Dash" && python -c "
import re
with open\('main/web/index.html', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

matches = list\(re.finditer\(r'class=\\"title\\"', content\)\)
for m in matches:
    start = max\(0, m.start\(\)-20\)
    end = min\(len\(content\), m.end\(\)+100\)
    print\(f'Position {m.start\(\)}: ...{repr\(content[start:end]\)}...'\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\ruuva\\workspace\\RDM-7_Dash" && python -c "
import re
with open\('main/web/index.html', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)
matches = list\(re.finditer\(r'data:image/png;base64,\([A-Za-z0-9+/=]+\)', content\)\)
for i, m in enumerate\(matches\):
    print\(f'Match {i}: position {m.start\(\)}, b64 length {len\(m.group\(1\)\)}'\)
")
